title: Add WrapupAgentStepStarted and WrapupAgentStepCompleted methods to RunOutput
description:
RunOutput has WrapupStepResult for shell steps but no equivalent for agent wrapup steps. Add two methods:

func (o *RunOutput) WrapupAgentStepStarted(index, total int, title string)
  Terminal: '  [%d/%d] %s...'
  Board: broadcast wrapup_agent_step_started event

func (o *RunOutput) WrapupAgentStepCompleted(index, total int, title, status string, duration time.Duration)
  Terminal: '  [%d/%d] %s — %s (%s)'
  Board: broadcast wrapup_agent_step_completed event

Files: internal/output/output.go
closed_reason: Replaced WrapupAgentStep with two separate methods: WrapupAgentStepStarted (prints '[i/n] title...' and broadcasts wrapup_agent_step_started) and WrapupAgentStepCompleted (prints '[i/n] title — status (duration)' and broadcasts wrapup_agent_step_completed). Updated callers in agent_steps.go and all tests in both output and wrapup packages.
